versions.version_description: First of all I made some editions to the text structure to improve the overview. I changed the chord postitions and the chords themselfes.
If anyone wants to improve this submission, I'd be really greatful :) Thank you.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Adam Lambert: Whataya Want from Me (Chords)
Lyrics from: Lyricsplugin.com
Tabbed by: vidgc
------------------------------------------

[tab][ch]Bmin[/ch]	[ch]D7[/ch]/[ch]C#[/ch]
Hey, slow it down[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]	[ch]Bmin[/ch]
Whataya want from me?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]	[ch]Bmin[/ch]
Whataya want from me?[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bmin[/ch]	[ch]D7[/ch]/[ch]C#[/ch]
Yea, I'm afraid[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]	[ch]Bmin[/ch]
Whataya want from me?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]	[ch]Bmin[/ch]
Whataya want from me?[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bmin[/ch]
There might've been a time[/tab]
[tab][ch]D7[/ch]/[ch]C#[/ch]
When I would give myself away[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]	[ch]Bmin[/ch]
Oh, once upon a time[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]	[ch]Bmin[/ch]
I didn't give a damn[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bmin[/ch]	[ch]D7[/ch]/[ch]C#[/ch]
But now here we are[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]	[ch]Bmin[/ch]
So whataya want from me?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]	[ch]Bmin[/ch]
Whataya want from me?[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]	[ch]A[/ch]		[ch]Bmin[/ch]	[ch]D[/ch]
Just don't give up, I'm workin' it out[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]	[ch]A[/ch]		[ch]Bmin[/ch]	[ch]D[/ch]
Please don't give in, I won't let you down[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]	[ch]A[/ch]		[ch]Bmin[/ch]	[ch]D[/ch]
It messed me up, need a second to breathe[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]	[ch]A[/ch]		[ch]Bmin[/ch]	[ch]D[/ch]
Just keep comin' around[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]	[ch]A[/ch]		[ch]Bmin[/ch]	[ch]D[/ch]
Hey, whataya want from me?[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]	[ch]A[/ch]	
Whataya want from me?[/tab]


[tab][ch]Bmin[/ch]	[ch]D7[/ch]/[ch]C#[/ch]
There, it's plain to see [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]	[ch]Bmin[/ch]
that baby, you're beautiful[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]	[ch]Bmin[/ch]
And there's nothing wrong with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bmin[/ch]	[ch]D7[/ch]/[ch]C#[/ch]
It's me, I'm a freak[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]	[ch]Bmin[/ch]
But thanks for lovin' me, [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]	[ch]Bmin[/ch]
‘cause you're doing it perfectly[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bmin[/ch]
There might have been a time [/tab]
[tab][ch]D7[/ch]/[ch]C#[/ch]
when I'd have let you slip away[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]	[ch]Bmin[/ch]
I wouldn't even try, but I think [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]	[ch]Bmin[/ch]
you could save my life[/tab]


[tab][ch]G[/ch]	[ch]A[/ch]		[ch]Bmin[/ch]	[ch]D[/ch]
Just don't give up, I'm workin' it out[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]	[ch]A[/ch]		[ch]Bmin[/ch]	[ch]D[/ch]
Please don't give in, I won't let you down[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]	[ch]A[/ch]		[ch]Bmin[/ch]	[ch]D[/ch]
It messed me up, need a second to breathe[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]	[ch]A[/ch]		[ch]Bmin[/ch]	[ch]D[/ch]
Just keep comin' around[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]	[ch]A[/ch]		[ch]Bmin[/ch]	[ch]D[/ch]
Hey, whataya want from me?[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]	[ch]A[/ch]
Whataya want from me?[/tab]

[tab]Repeat: [ch]G[/ch], [ch]A[/ch], [ch]Bmin[/ch], [ch]D[/ch]
Just don't give up on me[/tab]

[ch]Bmin[/ch]	[ch]D7[/ch]/[ch]C#[/ch]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]	[ch]Bmin[/ch]
I won't let you down[/tab]
 
Repeat Chorus 2x, end on Bmin
